title: Agent Memory Corruption Incident & Recovery

artifacts.name: decision_rejection_log
artifacts.description: Log of decisions rejected due to corrupted context state

artifacts.name: error_recovery_log
artifacts.description: Detailed error and recovery attempts during corruption incident

artifacts.name: memory_reconstruction_audit
artifacts.description: Audit trail of memory state reconstruction process

artifacts.name: agent_heartbeat_record
artifacts.description: Agent heartbeat records showing anomaly detection and recovery

artifacts.name: context_snapshot
artifacts.description: Pre and post-recovery context state snapshots

actions_taken: Detected context hash mismatch indicating memory corruption
Initiated memory reconstruction from last valid checkpoint
Validated reconstructed state via semantic checksum

root_cause: Vector database connection timeout during checkpoint write caused incomplete memory state persistence, leading to context fragmentation on subsequent session resume
lessons_learned: Implement checkpoint write atomicity with rollback capability
Add periodic context hash validation during long-running tasks
Enhance heartbeat anomaly detection for memory integrity
